questions.question: Describe the global issue of e-waste management and its impact on the environment. (10 marks)
What are the main differences between hazardous and non-hazardous e-waste, and how do they affect the global context of e-waste management? (15 marks)
Compare and contrast the e-waste management practices in developed and developing countries. How do these differences impact the global context of e-waste management? (20 marks)
